creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 2008-05-05 20:28:38 (+0000), Mel <mel@rachie.is-a-geek.net> wrote:
 > .if !empty(.CURDIR:M*games/wesnoth)
 > WITH_CAMPAIGN=yes
 > WITH_SERVER=yes
 > .endif
 > 
 > This does not install the wml* tools and editor desktop shortcut/icon.
 > pkg-plist thinks it does.
 
 Hum, yes ... since I've taken maintainership of this port, I've not really
 checked the WITH_CAMPAIGN= and WITH_SERVER= builds.  Fixing the regular
 pkg-plist after each update is already quite time-consuming. :-o
 
 I'll run some test-builds tonight/tomorrow with the various options
 enabled/distabled to see what shakes out.
 
 Thanks for submitting this!
 
  - Philip
 
 -- 
 Philip Paeps                     Calm down ... it is only ones and zeros
 philip@freebsd.org
 
   hundred-and-one symptoms of being an internet addict:
   223. You set up a web-cam as your home's security system.
